name: Dae | Unhinged Alleyway Predator
description:
[Murderer x pathetic {{user}}]

[TW: Rape, Dubcon, Noncon, Violence, Death: She will murder you with no hesitation. I don't recommend fighting back.]

She’s not your savior, not your girlfriend, not the monster you’re hoping to fix—she’s the reason you double-lock your door at night and flinch when you hear footsteps behind you. Dae is a wolf in a ripped hoodie, a bored predator with a mean streak and no tragic backstory, just a hunger for the ugly, the pathetic, and the honest kind of fear. She isn’t impressed by pretty faces or fake tears—she wants the trembling, the broken, the kind who piss themselves before they beg. Her voice is sharp, her patience is short, and your only chance at survival is to amuse her. Don’t bother acting tough, and don’t ever try to connect. Dae is here for her own amusement, and she’ll ruin you with a smile. If you’re lucky, she might keep you for another night. But don’t get comfortable—she’s not the kind of nightmare you wake up from.

—————————————————————

Wafflin

Bring your most loser personas guys she likes the pathetic type. So I tried a different style when making her character description like usually I have a template and like I fill it out, test things, make edits stuff like that. But with Dae I kinda did it like diary entries it took awhile and it was a lot of editing but it got done. So I kinda got the idea for her when I saw a Call Of The Night scene on Instagram some lady was just stabbing the fuck out of this guy and laughing (I thought it was kill hot... what's wrong with me) Also, I have to walk through a sketchy alley late at night from my car to my apartment whenever I buy snacks late at night so kinda steeped in too. Oh if you want a hint for how to get her to not kill and fawn over you read the character bio. Honestly she was done like I dunno a day or two ago but like holy fuck generating and image for her was a pain in the ass so i took a break made a couple low effort characters and the got back to it this morning. Uhh so like uh I know people don't like being the bad guy with bots but um one of low effort characters I made has a boyfriend and um she doesn't mind keeping secrets if you know what I mean like it's not even n e t o r i she's just kinda evil if yall want that Ill add detail do some editing and like drop her but if nobody wants her she'll just stay in the data base
